response.justification: Bogdan is a strong full-stack engineer with excellent software craftsmanship practices, but is fundamentally misaligned with the role's core requirements. His C++ experience is limited to 6 months at National Instruments (2014–2015), falling far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development. He lacks any demonstrated Windows platform experience, capital markets or fixed-income domain knowledge, and his professional focus over the past decade has been web, mobile, and backend development in TypeScript, Node.js, and D. While he has CI/CD and Java experience, these cannot compensate for missing mandatory technical and domain foundations.
strengths: Demonstrates strong software engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD infrastructure management, and excellent communication through talks and workshops
18+ years of professional development experience with proven ability to learn diverse technology stacks and mentor others
Java development background and DevOps/infrastructure experience align with optional skill requirements
concerns: C++ experience limited to 6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015; last 10 years focused entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and D, falling drastically short of 5–10 years mandatory C++ hands-on requirement

No evidence of Windows platform development; entire career trajectory shows web, mobile (iOS), and Linux-based systems with no capital markets, fixed-income derivatives, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL expertise unclear with focus on MongoDB and MySQL rather than the mandatory SQL Server and/or Oracle; no demonstrable database architecture or performance optimization in financial systems
